title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Bhopal office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises:
Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises!
